docs.title: Anixart API 9.0 beta 9
docs.text:
This is an unofficial OpenAPI specification of Anixart API

Based on Anixart 9.0 beta 9

Some of type definitions and endpoints are taken and converted from AnixartJS library

Made by @Radiquum at @Anix- Org

docs.title: Servers
docs.text: Description URL https://api-s.anixsekai.com https://api-s.anixsekai.com https://api.anixsekai.com https://api.anixsekai.com

docs.title: POST /auth/signIn
docs.text:
Sign in

Description

Sign in to account and get a token

Input parameters

Parameter In Type Default Nullable Description login query string No account login or email password query string No account password

Response 200 OK

application/json

docs.title: POST /auth/signUp
docs.text:
Sign up

Description

Sign up new account and get a verify code

Input parameters

Parameter In Type Default Nullable Description email query string No account email login query string No account login password query string No account password

Response 200 OK

application/json 

{
    "code": 0,
    "hash": "hash",
    "codeTimestampExpires": 0
}
⚠️ This example has been generated automatically from the schema and it is not accurate. Refer to the schema for more information.

Schema of the response body 
{
    "type": "object",
    "properties": {
        "code": {
            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/RegisterResult"
        },
        "hash": {
            "type": "string",
            "example": "hash"
        },
        "codeTimestampExpires": {
            "type": "integer"
        }
    }
}

docs.title: POST /auth/restore
docs.text:
Restore a password

Description

Send a verify code to restore a password

Input parameters

Parameter In Type Default Nullable Description login query string No account login

Response 200 OK

application/json 

{
    "code": 0,
    "hash": "hash",
    "codeTimestampExpires": 0
}
⚠️ This example has been generated automatically from the schema and it is not accurate. Refer to the schema for more information.

Schema of the response body 
{
    "type": "object",
    "properties": {
        "code": {
            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/RestoreResult"
        },
        "hash": {
            "type": "string",
            "example": "hash"
        },
        "codeTimestampExpires": {
            "type": "integer"
        }
    }
}
